steps.t: Sigeric is in the prison of Snowbourn. Gísling wants you to interrogate Sigeric and see if he is willing to part with any information about who sent h…
Sigeric is in the prison of Snowbourn. Perhaps if you <rgb=#FF00FF>stare</rgb> Sigeric down, he will break.
Sigeric can be found inside the prison of Snowbourn. Sigeric refuses to cooperate with the people of Snowbourn and has now mocked your attempts to bre…
Sigeric can be found inside the prison of Snowbourn. You should talk to Sigeric.
Gísling can be found in central Snowbourn. You should report Sigeric's refusal to cooperate to Gísling.
Fastred can be found in the Mead Hall of Snowbourn. Sigeric has proven to be a brutal traitor of Rohan, and Gísling wishes for you to tell Fastred of …
